description: Golden FEN positions for M11 structural feature testing (Structural Cognition Contract v1)

positions.name: Hole on d5 / Weak squares
positions.description: Position with a clear hole on d5 for Black (no Black pawns can contest it)

square_map.notes: d5 has a Black pawn so not a hole; testing basic functionality

positions.name: Dominated / Restricted piece
positions.description: Position where a piece is dominated (net_defense < -1) or restricted (low mobility)

per_piece.notes: Italian Game position - testing piece mobility and attack/defense

positions.name: Pawn structure tension with asymmetric control
positions.description: Position with pawn tension and clear control asymmetries

square_map.notes: French Advance - e5 pawn creates control asymmetry; d6 may be weak for Black

invariants: All extractions must produce exactly 32 piece slots
All square maps must have exactly 64 entries
Same FEN must produce byte-identical output across invocations
Captured pieces must have alive=false, square=null
Slot ordering must match Structural Cognition Contract v1
